_comment: Maps Microsoft Sentinel data-connector kinds to their Microsoft Defender XDR equivalent. Used by SimplicityConnectorMap.ps1. Add entries here when you encounter a connector kind we have not mapped yet, then file a PR.

OfficeATP.notes: Native in unified Defender XDR portal. No action.

OfficeIRM.notes: Continues to write to Log Analytics; surfaced in Purview portal not Defender XDR.

MicrosoftThreatProtection.notes: MDE incidents and alerts. Native in unified Defender XDR portal.

MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.notes: Native in unified Defender XDR portal.

AzureActiveDirectory.notes: Identity Protection signals surface in unified portal.

AzureActivity.notes: No native Defender XDR equivalent. Keep in Log Analytics for compliance / audit retention.

AzureSecurityCenter.notes: Defender for Cloud alerts surface in unified portal.

MicrosoftDefenderAdvancedThreatProtectio.notes: Defender for Endpoint native in unified portal.

AzureAdvancedThreatProtection.notes: Defender for Identity alerts surface in unified portal.

ThreatIntelligence.notes: Threat intel platform connector requires per-feed reauth + scope review during cutover.

ThreatIntelligenceTaxii.notes: TAXII feeds may need re-onboarding. Validate post-cutover.

AmazonWebServicesS3.notes: Third-party log source. Stays in Log Analytics for hunting; no Defender XDR view.

GoogleCloudPlatformProjects.notes: Third-party log source. Stays in Log Analytics for hunting.

GenericUI.notes: Generic UI connector covers ad-hoc data sources. Review each instance.
